# Cell 1: Load
```{r}
library(rJava)
library(rmcfs)
library(R.ROSETTA)
library(caret)

df <- read.csv("../../data/clean/train_data.csv",
               colClasses = "character",
               stringsAsFactors = FALSE)

# Drop column ID
data_train <- subset(df, select = -id )
dim(data_train)
```

# Cell 2: Params
```{r}
# Johnson params to try
johnson_param1 <- list(
    Modulo = TRUE,
    BRT = TRUE,
    BRTprec = 0.6,
    Precompute = FALSE,
    Approximate = TRUE,
    Fraction = 1
)

johnson_param2 <- list(
    Modulo = TRUE,
    BRT = TRUE,
    BRTprec = 0.5,
    Precompute = FALSE,
    Approximate = TRUE,
    Fraction = 1
)

# Anchor parameters for every rosetta model
fixed_classifier1 <- "StandardVoter"
fixed_underSample <- FALSE
fixed_reducerDiscernibility <- "Object"
fixed_reducer <- "Johnson"
fixed_roc <- FALSE


# MCFS
rank_feats1 <- mcfs(class ~ ., data_train, projections = 1250, projectionSize = 0.2, cutoffPermutations = 40, threadsNumber = 16)
rank_feats2 <- mcfs(class ~ ., data_train, projections = 1250, projectionSize = 0.2, cutoffPermutations = 40, threadsNumber = 16, cutoffMethod = "mean")

# Fetch results
train_feats1 <- rank_feats1$RI[1:rank_feats1$cutoff_value,]
train_feats2 <- rank_feats2$RI[1:rank_feats2$cutoff_value,]

# Keep only relevant features
sel_data_train1 <- data_train[, colnames(data_train) %in% c(train_feats1$attribute, "class"), drop = FALSE]
sel_data_train1 <- as.data.frame(sel_data_train1)
sel_data_train1[] <- lapply(sel_data_train1, as.factor)

sel_data_train2 <- data_train[, colnames(data_train) %in% c(train_feats2$attribute, "class"), drop = FALSE]
sel_data_train2 <- as.data.frame(sel_data_train2)
sel_data_train2[] <- lapply(sel_data_train2, as.factor)

dim(sel_data_train1)
dim(sel_data_train2)
```

# Cell 3: Implement Here
```{r}
results <- data.frame(
  seed        = integer(),
  ros_config  = character(),
  dataset     = character(),
  accuracy    = numeric(),
  stringsAsFactors = FALSE
)

for (seed in 1:2500) {
  set.seed(seed)

  for (ds in c("ds1", "ds2")) {
    dat <- if (ds == "ds1") sel_data_train1 else sel_data_train2

    for (cfg in c("jp1", "jp2")) {
      jp <- if (cfg == "jp1") johnson_param1 else johnson_param2

      ros <- rosetta(dat,
        reducer               = fixed_reducer,
        JohnsonParam          = jp,
        reducerDiscernibility = fixed_reducerDiscernibility,
        discrete              = TRUE,
        classifier            = fixed_classifier1,
        underSample           = fixed_underSample,
        roc                   = fixed_roc
      )

      results <- rbind(results, data.frame(
        seed       = seed,
        ros_config = cfg,
        dataset    = ds,
        accuracy   = ros$quality$accuracyMean,
        stringsAsFactors = FALSE
      ))
    }
  }
}
```

# Cell 4: Implement Rank
```{r}
combo_rank <- do.call(rbind, lapply(
  split(results, list(results$ros_config, results$dataset)),
  function(grp) {
    data.frame(
      combo    = paste0(grp$ros_config[1], "_", grp$dataset[1]),
      avg_acc  = round(mean(grp$accuracy, na.rm = TRUE), 4),
      stringsAsFactors = FALSE
    )
  }
))

combo_rank <- combo_rank[order(-combo_rank$avg_acc), ]
rownames(combo_rank) <- NULL
print(combo_rank)
```

# Cell 5: Implement top 5 runs
```{r}
top4 <- results[order(-results$accuracy), ][1:4, ]
rownames(top4) <- NULL
print(top4)
```
